hero.subtitle: Chat with GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, and more — all in one place. Customize your AI agent, upload files, and manage conversations effortlessly.

features.section-subtitle: A complete AI chat platform with powerful features built for productivity
features.multiple-models-desc: Access GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, and more through a single interface.
features.custom-agent-desc: Configure a system prompt to personalize your AI assistant's behavior and tone.
features.attachments-desc: Upload images and documents directly into your conversations for context-aware responses.
features.rbac-desc: Secure admin dashboard with user management, usage stats, and subscription controls.
features.streaming-desc: See responses appear word by word with live streaming for a natural conversation feel.
features.threads-desc: Organize your conversations with thread creation, renaming, archiving, and deletion.

pricing.section-subtitle: Buy coins with a one-time payment, then spend them on new chat threads. No subscriptions.
pricing.load-error: Could not load pricing. Please try again later.
pricing.not-configured: Coin packages are not configured yet.
pricing.feature-pay-as-you-go: Pay only for what you use

cta.title: Ready to start chatting?
cta.subtitle: Create your account and get 3 free threads to explore all the AI models we offer.

auth.sign-in-continue: Sign in to continue to KIOS Chat

chat.no-threads: No threads yet. Start a conversation!
chat.quota-one: You need at least {{count}} coin to create a new thread. Purchase more coins to continue.
chat.quota-many: You need at least {{count}} coins to create a new thread. Purchase more coins to continue.
chat.start-hint: Ask anything or choose a suggestion below to get started
chat.prompt-creative: Help me write a creative short story about a time traveler
chat.prompt-code: Review this code and suggest improvements for better performance
chat.prompt-explain: Explain quantum computing in simple terms with examples
chat.prompt-brainstorm: Help me brainstorm innovative product ideas for remote workers
chat.ocr-title: Convert this PDF with KIOS Scans
chat.ocr-description: PDFs are not attached directly in chat. Use KIOS Scans to turn your PDF into text, then upload the resulting .txt file or paste the text into your message.
chat.subthreads-empty: No sub-agents yet for this thread.
chat.submit-main-failed: Could not submit to main chat
chat.tokens-usage-title: Last request: total tokens / model context window (when reported by the provider)

dashboard.overview-description: Manage your AI application, view usage, update agents, and manage subscriptions.
dashboard.overview-page-desc: A quick glance at your account usage and recent activity.
dashboard.coin-balance-desc: Coins available to spend on threads and future services
dashboard.pricing-page-desc: Configure coin packages for Stripe checkout and set how many coins each service costs.
dashboard.users-page-desc: View all registered users and manage their coin balances.
dashboard.agent-page-desc: Main agent instructions and global sub-agents available in every thread.

buy-coins.title: Purchase coin packages
buy-coins.description: Choose a package to add coins to your account. Coins never expire.
buy-coins.load-error: Could not load packages. Please try again later.
buy-coins.no-packages: No coin packages are available yet. Contact an administrator.
buy-coins.purchase-failed: Failed to initiate purchase. Please try again.

usage.coin-balance-desc: Coins available to spend on threads and future services

service-price.card-desc: Set how many coins each system service costs. Thread price applies when a user creates a new chat thread.
service-price.thread-invalid: Enter a whole number 0 or greater

coin-packages-admin.card-desc: Packages users can buy with Stripe. Prices are in USD; each package grants the listed number of coins.
coin-packages-admin.empty: No coin packages yet. Add one to enable purchases.
coin-packages-admin.dialog-desc: Amounts are stored in cents on the server; enter dollars below for the Stripe checkout price.
coin-packages-admin.delete-desc: This cannot be undone. Past Stripe purchases are unaffected.
coin-packages-admin.validation-label-coins: Enter a valid label and coin amount

agent-editor.system-prompt-desc: This prompt will be prepended to every conversation as the system message. It defines your AI agent's personality and behavior. Maximum size follows the selected main chat model's context from OpenRouter (characters are an estimate; space is reserved for the thread).
agent-editor.main-model-hint: OpenRouter model used for the main agent in every thread. Change it here instead of in the chat view.
agent-editor.placeholder-prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant specialized in...
agent-editor.preview-desc: See how your agent will respond with this system prompt
agent-editor.preview-with-prompt: I'll respond based on the persona defined in the system prompt above.
agent-editor.preview-no-prompt: No system prompt configured. I'll respond with default behavior.

instruction-limit.no-cap: OpenRouter did not report context for this model; instructions are not length-capped.

subagent.manager-desc: Configure tools the main agent can call. Each sub-agent runs in its own queued job with an isolated context (input only, no main thread history).
subagent.empty: No sub-agents yet. Add one to expose function tools to the main agent.
subagent.delete-confirm: Delete sub-agent "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
subagent.tool-name-hint: Used as the function name the main agent calls. Cannot be changed after creation.
subagent.form-instructions-hint: Max length follows this sub-agent's model context from OpenRouter (estimate; space reserved for the tool run).
subagent.no-input-params: No input parameters — the tool accepts an empty object.
subagent.response-format-hint: How the sub-agent should format its reply (plain text, Markdown, or JSON).
subagent.output-fields-hint: Optional. Describe fields the sub-agent should include in its output (added to the system prompt).
subagent.no-output-fields: No structured output fields — only the response format above applies.

validation.password-min: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.name-min: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.subagent-name-format: Name must start with a letter; use letters, digits, underscores only
validation.update-one-field: At least one field is required

upload.file-type: File type "{{type}}" is not allowed. You can upload plain text (.txt), or choose a PDF to open the OCR conversion helper—other types are not supported.
upload.pdf-use-ocr: Please convert PDF documents to text before uploading. You can use our OCR service.

agent.prompt-too-long: Instructions are too long for the selected model's context window (max about {{max}} characters, estimated from OpenRouter). Shorten the text or pick a larger-context model.
